item.title: Vaccines and Memories
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

Vaccines and Memories

RFK Jr.’s lawyer did plea,
To ban polio vaccines, with glee.
Yet diseases of old,
Once deadly and bold,
Are now just a faint memory.

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • RFK Jr.’s Lawyer Has Asked the FDA to Revoke Polio Vaccine Approval
  • Six Childhood Scourges We’ve Forgotten About, Thanks to Vaccines

item.title: Secrets, Scandals, and Shakes
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

Secrets, Scandals, and Shakes

Trump’s power, it seems, has no end,
With secret funds and plans to upend.
His health picks are odd,
Against norms they trod,
While scandals in Brazil descend.

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • Trump Is Running His Transition Team on Secret Money
  • Trump’s Choices for Health Agencies Suggest a Shake-Up Is Coming
  • Brazil Cracked Down on Corruption. Now It’s Undoing the Case.

item.title: Trump's Picks and the Great Fluoride Fix
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

Trump’s Picks and the Great Fluoride Fix

Trump’s cabinet picks cause a fuss,
With RFK Jr. causing distrust.
While Gaetz and Gabbard cheer,
Deep State’s still here,
And fluoride debates are robust.

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • Trump Picks RFK Jr. to Be Head of Health and Human Services Dept.
  • With Gaetz, Gabbard and Hegseth, Trump Takes on Pillars of the ‘Deep State’
  • The Anti-Fluoride Movement Vaults Into the Mainstream
